signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Chatter | NO | LOW confidence**

Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Chatter | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets as of April 21, 2026, center on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, including "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (with "220-239" at 32% odds) and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?" (1120-1159 at 28% or 18% in varying reports).[2][3][4]
